title: TPH Swift
description: An Optifine substitute which isn't just about performance!
body:
# 🔍 Overview! Fabric optimization has reached a point where maximum performance packs are almost entirely unnecessary for most users with semi-modern hardware. TPH Swift aims to create a more unique, performant experience by enhancing the Vanilla experience with graphical improvements and quality-of-life enhancements.
### Looking for a server? Come join our small community server included in the mod pack! More information can be found in our [Discord](https://discord.gg/VUBr6a7Y7x)! # 🛠️ Technical Details! The **minimum RAM** allocation is **2 GB**; however, it is recommended to allocate **4 GB** or more. --- ### If performance is an issue, please try... - Disabling Shaders... - and/or Disabling Distant Horizons... - and/or Lowering Render Distance. # 🌟 Credits and Thanks! - **All of the included project developers!**
